# services.clamav

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.clamav`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.clamav.clamonacc.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable ClamAV on-access scanner. The settings for ClamAV's on-access scanner is configured in `clamd.conf` via `services.clamav.daemon.settings`. Refer to <https://docs.clamav.net/manual/OnAccess.html> on how to configure it. Example to scan `/home/foo/Downloads` (and block access until scanning is completed) would be: `services.clamav = {   daemon.enable = true;   clamonacc.enable = true;    daemon.settings = {     OnAccessPrevention = true;     OnAccessIncludePath = "/home/foo/Downloads";   }; };` |
| `services.clamav.daemon.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable ClamAV clamd daemon. |
| `services.clamav.daemon.settings` | `attribute set of (boolean or signed integer or string or list of string)` | ClamAV configuration. Refer to <https://linux.die.net/man/5/clamd.conf>, for details on supported values. |
| `services.clamav.fangfrisch.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable ClamAV fangfrisch updater. |
| `services.clamav.fangfrisch.interval` | `string` | How often freshclam is invoked. See {manpage}`systemd.time(7)` for more information about the format. |
| `services.clamav.fangfrisch.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of attribute set of (string or signed integer or boolean)` | fangfrisch configuration. Refer to <https://rseichter.github.io/fangfrisch/#_configuration>, for details on supported values. Note that by default urlhaus and sanesecurity are enabled. |
| `services.clamav.package` | `package` | The clamav package to use. |
| `services.clamav.scanner.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable ClamAV scanner. |
| `services.clamav.scanner.interval` | `string` | How often clamdscan is invoked. See {manpage}`systemd.time(7)` for more information about the format. By default this runs using 10 cores at most, be sure to run it at a time of low traffic. |
| `services.clamav.scanner.scanDirectories` | `list of string` | List of directories to scan. The default includes everything I could think of that is valid for nixos. Feel free to contribute a PR to add to the default if you see something missing. |
| `services.clamav.updater.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable ClamAV freshclam updater. |
| `services.clamav.updater.frequency` | `signed integer` | Number of database checks per day. |
| `services.clamav.updater.interval` | `string` | How often freshclam is invoked. See {manpage}`systemd.time(7)` for more information about the format. |
| `services.clamav.updater.settings` | `attribute set of (boolean or signed integer or string or list of string)` | freshclam configuration. Refer to <https://linux.die.net/man/5/freshclam.conf>, for details on supported values. |
